scripts.title: Whispers of Dreamland
scripts.hook: Shhh... Listen to the soft whispers of dreamland now.
scripts.lyrics:
{
"Whispers of Dreamland": [
"Shhh... Listen to the soft whispers of dreamland now",
"The moon's gentle glow is shining down",
"Dreamy clouds are floating by so slow",
"And everything feels peaceful and bright",
"In this special place, we'll rest tonight",
"All worries fade like morning dew",
"Sleepy stars are twinkling just for you",
"And a soft breeze whispers secrets too",
"The world outside will wait awhile",
"But in dreamland, it's always smile",
"So close your eyes and take a deep breath in",
"Let the calmness of this place begin",
"In the quiet night, we'll find our nest",
"And in the morning light, we'll be refreshed",
"Dreams are made of sparkles and delight",
"And in dreamland, everything is just right",
"The soft whispers guide us through the night",
"To a peaceful sleep, where all is bright",
"Shhh... Listen to the soft whispers of dreamland now"
]
}

scenes.visual: continuation of the previous visual with the reflection of stars shimmering on the water and a soft color palette

scripts.cta: Sleep well, little one. Guiding children into a peaceful sleep with calming sounds and gentle words..

scripts.title: Nighttime Ocean
scripts.hook: Drift off to the rhythm of the nighttime ocean waves.
scripts.lyrics:
{
"lyrics": [
"Dreamy waves whisper secrets sweet",
"In the nighttime ocean, where stars meet",
"The moon dips low, the sun says goodnight",
"The world slows down, and all's made right",
"Waves caress the shore, a gentle sway",
"As night falls deep, come what may",
"Drift off to rhythm of the ocean's song",
"Where peaceful dreams and rest belong",
"Dreamy waves whisper secrets sweet",
"In the nighttime ocean, where stars meet",
"The moon dips low, the sun says goodnight",
"Waves crash softly, like a lullaby tune",
"As night falls deep, come what may",
"Sleepy time, when all is calm",
"Drift off to rhythm of the ocean's song",
"Dreamy waves whisper secrets sweet",
"In the nighttime ocean, where stars meet",
"The moon dips low, the sun says goodnight",
"Waves crash softly, like a lullaby tune",
"As night falls deep, come what may",
"Soothing ocean breeze blows by",
"Sleep tight, with the stars up high",
"Dreamy waves whisper secrets sweet",
"In the nighttime ocean, where stars meet"
]
}

scripts.title: Stars Above
scripts.hook: Count the stars above as they twinkle gently in the sky.
scripts.lyrics:
{
"lyrics": [
"Gently twinkle stars above",
"Shining bright in the midnight love",
"Softly glowing like a gentle light",
"In the sky so dark and quiet tonight",
"Count them high, count them low",
"As they sparkle and start to go",
"To sleep, my dear, it's time to rest",
"The stars are singing their sweetest nest",
"In the darkness, all is calm",
"The world outside begins to fade",
"But in your dreams, a new path's made",
"The stars above, a twinkling sea",
"Reflecting moonbeams shining free",
"Like diamonds scattered far and wide",
"In the velvet sky, where dreams reside",
"Gently twinkle stars above",
"Shining bright in the midnight love",
"So close, yet so very far away",
"A lullaby to guide you home tonight",
"The stars are singing their sweetest nest",
"To sleep, my dear, it's time to rest",
"In the stillness, all is well",
"The world outside begins to fade",
"But in your dreams, a new path's made",
"Sleep tight, my child, and dream of more",
"The stars above, a twinkling sea",
"Reflecting moonbeams shining free",
"Like diamonds scattered far and wide",
"In the velvet sky, where dreams reside",
"Gently twinkle stars above",
"To sleep, my dear, it's time to rest"
]
}

scripts.title: Lullaby of the Wind
scripts.hook: Feel the gentle breeze as it carries you off to sleep.
scripts.lyrics:
{
"lyrics": [
"Wind whispers secrets to me",
"As I drift away to sleep",
"Gentle breeze carries me free",
"To a land of dreams so deep",
"The wind's soft sighs rock me",
"In and out, side to side",
"My eyelids grow heavy now",
"As the wind's lullaby flows",
"Warm air wraps me in love",
"Making my heart feel light",
"In this peaceful evening sky",
"The stars shine bright above",
"But I'll stay here where it's calm",
"And let the wind be my balm",
"It rocks and sings to me",
"A gentle song of peace",
"My breathing slows, I'm free",
"As the wind's melody",
"Whispers secrets to me",
"To a land of dreams so deep",
"The stars shine bright above",
"But I'll stay here where it's calm",
"And let the wind be my balm",
"It rocks and sings to me",
"A gentle song of peace",
"My heart is full and light",
"As the wind whispers goodnight",
"Sleepy time, come what may",
"I'll follow the wind away",
"To a land of dreams so deep",
"The stars shine bright above",
"But I'll stay here where it's calm",
"And let the wind be my balm"
]
}

scripts.title: Rain Lullaby
scripts.hook: Listen to the calming sound of raindrops falling gently.
scripts.lyrics:
{
"Rain Lullaby": [
"Droplets falling from above",
"Gently on our roof love",
"The rain's sweet serenade starts",
"Soften your heart, calm your starts",
"Listen close to the sound",
"As it wraps you all around",
"In a cozy, sleepy nest",
"Feeling safe, feeling best",
"Raindrops keep on falling down",
"Soothing out each frown",
"The patter of tiny feet",
"Echoes in this sweet retreat",
"Whispers calm and true",
"Come rest with me, it's new",
"Gentle rain, gentle sleep",
"In the rhythm, we'll creep",
"To a land of peaceful dreams",
"No worries, no loud screams",
"Just quiet moments shared",
"The rain's soft song is played",
"As our eyelids gently swayed",
"Cradled in this cozy nest",
"Your heart beats at its best",
"Droplets falling from above",
"Gently on our roof love"
]
}
